出: [vi] go out, depart; go to, be present
休: [vi] (take a rest, repose; suspend, discontinue; be absent; go to bed, retire
先: point, tip; the future; destination; first, ahead of; before, earlier
半: Half (an hour). E.g.,  5[ご]時[じ]半[はん] = 5:30
言: say, speak, state; call, refer to
食: [vt] eat colloq. ; hold on to in one’s mouth , not let go
字: 字[じ]：character [symbol] used in a writing system 字[あざ]：section of a town [village]「特」
帰: [vi] come back / home, return to one's original position
引: draw, pull, haul, tug; drag, trail
去: [vi] go away, leave; go by, elapse; get rid of
品: 品[しな]：goods, articles 品[ひん]：grace, elegance, dignity
起: [vi] rise, wake up; occur, break out
集: [vi] gather, meet, crowd; be collected money ; converge, center, focus
以: not less than; beyond; the above-mentioned; now that; that's all
借: [vt] borrow, get a loan; hire, rent
玉: 玉[たま]：gem, jewel, ball 玉[ぎょく]：jewel, jade「歴」
角: 角[かど]：corner, edge 角[つの]：horns, antlers
矢: as I thought, expected; also, still; after all is said and done
打: to hit, to strike, to knock, to beat
整: する：to service (an aeroplane [airplane]), to maintain (a car engine), to adjust (a machine)
畑: cultivated land, dry field vs. submerged ones
登: する：to appear (on stage, in the marketplace, etc.)
皮: skin, hide leather, bark, rind, peel
遊: [vi] play, amuse oneself; play around with, flirt; make an excursion, take a trip; visit
面: 面[めん]：mask, surface, aspect 面[おもて]：face, surface ♢ 面[つら]：face (impolite) ♢
付: [vi] attach / adhere to ; be connected with
冷: cold to the touch , chilly; coldhearted, cold-blooded
参: [vi] [humble] go come ; visit a holy place
府: prefectural office (used only for Osaka and Kyoto)
得: [vt] acquire, gain; can, be able to
成: become, form, consist of; be accomplished
挙: to raise (one's hand), to provide (examples), to enumerate (reasons), to arrest
望: [vt] hope / ask for, desire; expect sb. to do
残: [vi] remain, linger, stay; be left over; survive
法: law, rule, regulation; model, pattern; religious doctrine, Buddha's teachings
焼: to bake, to grill, to burn
笑: [vi] laugh, smile; laugh at, ridicule, deride
隊: a group of soldiers (squad, flotilla, etc.)
任: [vt] leave up to, entrust with; leave alone
似: to be alike, to resemble, to look like
修: する：to amend, to revise, to modify, to correct, to retouch
務: [vi] perform one's duties; play one's part
因: to be caused by, to be due to ♢
寄: [vi] approach, draw near to; call on
導: する：to introduce (a new system, technology, etc.)
張: spread out , extend over ; stretch, strain
慣: [vi] get used to, become experienced in
招: [vt] invite; beckon, call; engage so.'s services
断: [vt] refuse, reject; give advance notice, inform
格: suitability, moderate price ; shape, form; appearance, manner
構: mind, care about / for; be concerned about; entertain
留: absence from home ; caretaking; defending as one's lord is away
確: If I'm not mistaken, If I remember correctly
造: [vt] make, build what needs time and skill
並: [vi] line up, form a line, stand in a row, be parallel
乱: [vt] put into disorder, disturb, throw into confusion; dishevel
亡: [vi] die, pass away, breathe one’s last
処: する：to deal with, to manage, to treat, to dispose of
刻: [vt] cut fine; engrave, carve; of a clock tick away
危: dangerous, perilous, risky; critical, serious; uncertain, insecure
収: [vi] be put back in place, restored be settled, brought to a settlement
拝: [vt] bow in veneration, worship; pay respects with joined hands , entreat
探: [vt] look for, search for (sth. desired, needed
暮: [vi] live, lead one's life; make a living
済: [vi] be settled, concluded; do / manage without , get off with
背: 背[せい]、 背[せ]：stature, height 背[せ]：back (of a person's body [chair, book])
頂: [vt] receive humbly, be given; eat, drink
渡: [vt] carry across a river ; hand over
販: する：to sell, to market, to deal in
込: [vi] put into; go into; be crowded
途: in the middle of, en route
更: する：to renew, to establish a new record, to update
抱: 抱[だ]く：to hug, to hold in one's arms 抱[いだ]く：to embrace, to harbour (hope, ambition, etc.)
傾: [vi] incline, lean; tend to; decline, fall
刺: to stab, to pierce, to sting
御: prefix expressing respect, typically used for non-chinese words
溶: to melt, to dissolve (as in salt in water) (vi.)
畜: beast [Buddh.: person rebort as …] ; Damn it!
伺: [vt] inquire about , be told; pay a visit
傷: to get hurt, to be hurt
射: する：to kill with a gun
推: する：to promote, to propel, to push forward
臨: [vi]attend, be present at ; face, look out over
貴: You - referring to someone of equal or lower status
遣: to do; to undertake; to perform; to play (a game); to study
崩: to destroy, to level (a hill), to change [break] (a large bill), to write characters in a fluid [cursive] style
執: する：to execute (a sentence), to carry out (an order)
載: [vi] be placed upon; appear in print
拒: する：to reject, to refuse, to veto
懸: [vt] stake one’s life , risk; offer / set a prize
掲: [vt] put up, hoist; display in writing, publish
併: する：to use together, to use two things at the same time
控: hold back, restrain oneself; wait for; deduct; note down
撮: to take (a picture), to make (a film)
是: right and/or wrong; by all means, at any cost
暫: a while; a good while; for the time being
柄: 柄[え]：handle (of an umbrella, etc.) 柄[がら]：pattern, design
陥: to fall into (a trap, difficulties, etc.)
滅: to ruin, to destroy, to overthrow
尽: [vt] use up, exhaust; make utmost efforts
蓄: to store, to save, to reserve
縁: 縁[えん]：fate, karma, a relation 縁[ふち]：edge
膨: [vi] expand, get big, swell out , become inflated
耐: to endure, to bear, to withstand
漏: to leak out, to escape, to come through, to be heard outside (a window, etc.)
芳: not good, unsavoury, poor (performance, reputation, etc.)
懲: [vi] learn a lesson; have had enough of
揚: [vt] raise, hoist; fry in deep fat
覆: to cover, to conceal, to hide
尋: [vt] look for, inquire about, after; into
悟: to be enlightened spiritually, to realise
妊: する：to get pregnant, to conceive a child
据: [vt] set in position, install; set a table ; lay a foundation
軌: track, railway; planetary orbit; beaten track
遭: [vi] meet with maybe undesirable ; encounter, be confronted
鎌: Kamakura city in Kanagawa prefecture; seat of national government, 1185-1333
宰: する：to organise, to supervise, to oversee「特」
伏: [vt] lay upside down, turn downward / over
鎮: する：to be put out, to be extinguished, to put out, to extinguish (vi./vt.)
娠: する：to get pregnant, to conceive a child
潤: する：to embellish, to add colour to (a story) ♢
該: する：to fall under (an applicable rule [provision]), to be applicable, to correspond to
吐: [vt] spew, vomit; exhale; emit, send forth
賓: ひんきゃく ひんかく
如: how? would you like? how about?
凝: [vi] grow stiff; be absorbed in; be elaborate
眺: [vt] look out over afar, at , gaze, watch
亘: [vi] extend over / for, range, span, last
媛: damsel, young lady of noble birth
弦: 弦[げん]：string (on an instrument), bowstring 弦[つる]：bowstring, string (on an instrument)「特」
鼓: する：to beat, to throb, to pulsate
紺: dark blue ground; dark blue cloth
遮: する：to cut off, to stop, to interrupt (traffic, etc.), to block
藩: feudal domain [fief] in the Tokugawa era「歴」
迭: する：to make a switch (in the Cabinet, etc.)
挿: する：to insert, to put into
陪: する：to sit with one's superior
剖: する：to perform an autopsy, to dissect
渇: to be thirsty, to get dry
叔: uncle younger than one's parent; cf. 伯 1184
逓: する：to decrease gradually, to diminish successively
鋳: to cast, to mould, to coin
抹: する：to wipe out, to kill
隷: する：to be subordinate to, to follow orders
禍: root of evil, source of trouble
殉: する：to kill oneself after the death of one's lord [master]
劾: report of an official's offense (to the emperor)
慕: [vt] adore, love dearly; miss, long, yearn for
凹: [vi] get dented, cave in; [colloq] get depressed, feel down
憧: to long for, to yearn for, to admire
只: free of charge; just, only; ordinary
謄: certified copy, transcript; copy of the domiciliary register
丑: northeast (supplementary sign of the Oriental zodiac)
汐: drawing water from the sea person who …
畝: [vi] wind (of a road, …), meander, twist; undulate, surge, swell
但: provided / on condition that, however, but, only
旦: patron, protector, donor; master, sir; husband
謁: to have an audience (with a noble person, etc.)「特」
濫: する：to cut down trees indiscriminately
汰: する：to select, to weed out, to screen, to sift
斬: [vt] kill so. with a blade, cut down , slice off
粧: する：to makeup, to put on make-up
芯: core of fruit ; wick; lead of a pencil ; padding
畿: five territories near Kyōto once under direct imperial rule
桁: crossbeam, girder, figure, digit, place (as in decimal places)

慌: [vi] be flurried, confused, be in a hurry
塞: [vt] stop up, fill in; obstruct, block, cover
凄: horrible, terrible, superb, fantastic, tremendous, awful
膳: meal set on a table, small dining table
遡: [vi] go back to the past ; go upstream; retroact
潰: [vt] crush, smash; butcher, kill; ruin, wreck
諦: [vt] give up, abandon; resign oneself to
捻: [vt] twist, turn; contrive a solution to ; easily defeat
蔽: する：to hide, to conceal, to cover up
刹: moment, instant; kṣaṇa (1/75 of a second
惧: する：to feel misgivings about, to be apprehensive about
慄: to be filled with horror, to be horrified
拉: する：to take someone away, to abduct
楷: square / block Chinese character style [used in writing or printing]
叩: [vt] strike, beat, hit; criticize, verbally abuse; clap, play drums
逢: [vt] have (so.) meet (another), allow (a person) to see (so.)

覗: [vt] peek, look into; stick out, peek through
